name: Buttermilk Rye Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon caraway seeds (more or less to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the bread pan.
2. Select the Light Crust setting.
3. Press Start.
This is a reliable recipe that works well with our Hitachi 101 machine. For other machines, adjust as follows:
- DAK/Welbilt: Add 3 tablespoons more buttermilk or water.
- Panasonic/National: Use 4 1/2 teaspoons yeast.
